CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SOSTIK MARSHA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WILLIAMS FREDERIC HANS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
